description: Push Dagster run lifecycle events as OTLP/HTTP metrics (Sum + Gauge). Distinct from dagster_runs_to_otlp_sensor which emits OTel logs.

otlp_endpoint_env_var.label: OTLP Endpoint Env Var
otlp_endpoint_env_var.description: Env var with OTLP/HTTP base URL — /v1/metrics is appended.

otlp_headers_env_var.label: OTLP Headers Env Var
otlp_headers_env_var.description: Env var with comma-separated k=v,k=v headers.
